violations.description: Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 70F to 41F or below within four hours. -Sweet potato casserole placed into walk in cooler after yesterday's service found with temperature of 48F to 52F. *Disposed of immediately.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Sour cream in 3 door refrigerator was not dated for open date.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -1000 island dressing (made in-house) dated 1/21 and 2/18.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Dried food debris at blade of can opener.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris at blade of can opener.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Dessert pan found with temperature of 57-60F. -Cold vegetable salad found with temperature of 57-59F. -Pre-portions cold items kept at counter top 60F. ***All items should be maintained at 41F or less during meals on wheels preparation and lunch service.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed with soiled outer clothing. -Observed employee with animal fur on shirt.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani buckets found with less than 200ppm. *COS-Sani is right at 200ppm Quat when fresh.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Container of sour cream dated 10/24. *Disposed of immediately. -Meat sauce in walk in cooler dated 11/13.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Can opener blade has dried food debris at blades.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
